//App 1

//Program
using IntegriteCBPFX.App;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Time;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using NLog;
using NLog.Extensions.Logging;

var logger = LogManager.GetCurrentClassLogger();

try
{
    var builder = Host.CreateApplicationBuilder(args);

    // Journalisation : NLog comme unique fournisseur, configuré depuis la section "NLog" d'appsettings.
    builder.Logging.ClearProviders();
    LogManager.Setup().LoadConfigurationFromSection(builder.Configuration);
    builder.Logging.AddNLog();

    // Services transverses + slice(s).
    builder.Services.AddSingleton<IClock, SystemClock>();
    builder.Services.AddVerificationFeature(builder.Configuration);

    using var host = builder.Build();

    VerificationMode mode;
    try
    {
        mode = VerificationArgs.ResolveMode(args);
    }
    catch (FormatException ex)
    {
        logger.Error(ex, "Arguments de ligne de commande invalides.");
        return ExitCodes.InvalidArguments;
    }

    // Annulation propre sur Ctrl+C / arrêt Control-M.
    using var cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
    Console.CancelKeyPress += (_, eventArgs) =>
    {
        eventArgs.Cancel = true;
        cts.Cancel();
    };

    using var scope = host.Services.CreateScope();
    var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<RunVerificationHandler>();

    var result = await handler.HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(mode), cts.Token);

    return ExitCodes.FromResult(result);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    logger.Fatal(ex, "Échec inattendu de la vérification.");
    return ExitCodes.UnexpectedError;
}
finally
{
    // Vide les buffers des targets NLog (important pour un batch court).
    LogManager.Shutdown();
}

//End Program



//VerificationArgs

using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App;

/// <summary>
/// Analyse des arguments de ligne de commande passés par Control-M.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>
/// Usage :
///   IntegriteCBPFX                       -> mode Veille (défaut)
///   IntegriteCBPFX Veille                -> fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = J
///   IntegriteCBPFX JourneeCourante       -> fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = J
///   IntegriteCBPFX --mode JourneeCourante / --mode=JourneeCourante
/// </remarks>
public static class VerificationArgs
{
    /// <summary>Résout le mode d'exécution à partir des arguments (défaut : Veille).</summary>
    /// <exception cref="FormatException">Si un mode est fourni mais non reconnu.</exception>
    public static VerificationMode ResolveMode(string[] args)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(args);

        var raw = ExtractModeToken(args);
        if (raw is null)
        {
            return VerificationMode.Veille;
        }

        if (!Enum.TryParse<VerificationMode>(raw, ignoreCase: true, out var mode))
        {
            throw new FormatException(
                $"Mode invalide : « {raw} ». Valeurs attendues : {nameof(VerificationMode.Veille)}, {nameof(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante)}.");
        }

        return mode;
    }

    private static string? ExtractModeToken(string[] args)
    {
        for (var i = 0; i < args.Length; i++)
        {
            var arg = args[i];
            if (arg.StartsWith("--mode=", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return arg["--mode=".Length..];
            }

            if (arg.Equals("--mode", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && i + 1 < args.Length)
            {
                return args[i + 1];
            }

            if (!arg.StartsWith('-'))
            {
                return arg; // argument positionnel
            }
        }

        return null;
    }
}

//EndVerificationArgs



//ExitCodes

using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App;

/// <summary>
/// Codes de sortie du processus, interprétés par Control-M.
/// Convention : 0 = OK (le job a tourné), &gt; 0 = échec technique du job.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>
/// La présence d'anomalies N'EST PAS un échec : le run a réussi, les anomalies
/// sont des données métier (le Back-Office est alerté via la notification).
/// Si Control-M doit brancher spécifiquement sur « anomalies détectées », ajouter
/// ici un code dédié (p. ex. 10) et l'utiliser dans <see cref="FromResult"/>.
/// </remarks>
public static class ExitCodes
{
    /// <summary>Run terminé avec succès (avec ou sans anomalies).</summary>
    public const int Success = 0;

    /// <summary>Erreur inattendue (exception non gérée).</summary>
    public const int UnexpectedError = 1;

    /// <summary>Run en échec fonctionnel (p. ex. source indisponible / « API down »).</summary>
    public const int VerificationFailed = 2;

    /// <summary>Arguments de ligne de commande invalides.</summary>
    public const int InvalidArguments = 3;

    public static int FromResult(RunVerificationResult result)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(result);
        return result.Succeeded ? Success : VerificationFailed;
    }
}

//End ExitCodes


//VerificationStore
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Persistance Dapper des résultats (run + anomalies) dans le schéma cbp.
/// Les tables sont créées par les DBA via les scripts de db/ — l'appli n'exécute que des INSERT/UPDATE.
/// </summary>
public sealed class VerificationStore(IIntegriteDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory, ILogger<VerificationStore> logger) : IVerificationStore
{
    private const string ExistsRunSql =
        "SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cbp.VerificationRun WHERE Id = @Id;";

    private const string InsertRunSql =
        """
        INSERT INTO cbp.VerificationRun
            (Id, BusinessDate, Status, StartedAtUtc, CompletedAtUtc, CbpTransactionCount, FxTransactionCount, AnomalyCount, FailureReason)
        VALUES
            (@Id, @BusinessDate, @Status, @StartedAtUtc, @CompletedAtUtc, @CbpTransactionCount, @FxTransactionCount, @AnomalyCount, @FailureReason);
        """;

    private const string UpdateRunSql =
        """
        UPDATE cbp.VerificationRun
        SET Status = @Status,
            CompletedAtUtc = @CompletedAtUtc,
            CbpTransactionCount = @CbpTransactionCount,
            FxTransactionCount = @FxTransactionCount,
            AnomalyCount = @AnomalyCount,
            FailureReason = @FailureReason
        WHERE Id = @Id;
        """;

    private const string InsertAnomalySql =
        """
        INSERT INTO cbp.AnomalyTransaction
            (Id, DateCreationErreur, IdCBPTransaction, IdFxSentryTransaction, CodeErreur, DescriptionErreur, ChampsErreurs)
        VALUES
            (@Id, @DateCreationErreur, @IdCBPTransaction, @IdFxSentryTransaction, @CodeErreur, @DescriptionErreur, @ChampsErreurs);
        """;

    public async Task SaveRunAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(run);

        var parameters = new
        {
            run.Id,
            run.BusinessDate,
            Status = run.Status.ToString(),
            run.StartedAtUtc,
            run.CompletedAtUtc,
            run.CbpTransactionCount,
            run.FxTransactionCount,
            run.AnomalyCount,
            run.FailureReason,
        };

        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();

        var exists = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>(
            new CommandDefinition(ExistsRunSql, new { run.Id }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        var sql = exists > 0 ? UpdateRunSql : InsertRunSql;
        await connection.ExecuteAsync(new CommandDefinition(sql, parameters, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        logger.LogDebug("Run {RunId} {Action} (statut {Status}).", run.Id, exists > 0 ? "mis à jour" : "inséré", run.Status);
    }

    public async Task AddAnomaliesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(anomalies);
        if (anomalies.Count == 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        // Dapper exécute l'INSERT une fois par élément de la séquence.
        var rows = anomalies.Select(a => new
        {
            a.Id,
            a.DateCreationErreur,
            a.IdCBPTransaction,
            a.IdFxSentryTransaction,
            CodeErreur = (int)a.CodeErreur,
            a.DescriptionErreur,
            a.ChampsErreurs,
        });

        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
        var inserted = await connection.ExecuteAsync(new CommandDefinition(InsertAnomalySql, rows, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        logger.LogDebug("{Count} anomalie(s) persistée(s).", inserted);
    }
}

//End VerificationStore


//VerificationModule

using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Câblage DI de la slice Verification. Point d'entrée unique : le host appelle
/// <c>AddVerificationFeature(configuration)</c> et toute la slice est enregistrée.
/// </summary>
public static class VerificationModule
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddVerificationFeature(this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)
    {
        // --- Options validées ---
        services.AddOptions<CbpApiOptions>()
            .Bind(configuration.GetSection(CbpApiOptions.SectionName))
            .ValidateDataAnnotations();

        services.AddOptions<FxSentryOptions>()
            .Bind(configuration.GetSection(FxSentryOptions.SectionName))
            .ValidateDataAnnotations();

        services.AddOptions<SecretServerOptions>()
            .Bind(configuration.GetSection(SecretServerOptions.SectionName))
            .ValidateDataAnnotations();

        // --- Moteur de vérification (SharedKernel) ---
        services.AddSingleton<ITransactionComparer, TransactionComparer>();
        services.AddSingleton<VerificationEngine>();

        // --- Sécurité : bearer token CBP fourni par Secret Server ---
        services.AddHttpClient(SecretServerCbpTokenProvider.HttpClientName, (sp, client) =>
        {
            var options = sp.GetRequiredService<IOptions<SecretServerOptions>>().Value;
            if (options.BaseUrl is not null)
            {
                client.BaseAddress = options.BaseUrl;
            }
        })
        .AddStandardResilienceHandler(); // retry + timeout + circuit-breaker
        services.AddSingleton<ICbpTokenProvider, SecretServerCbpTokenProvider>();
        services.AddTransient<CbpBearerTokenHandler>();

        // --- Source CBP : HttpClient typé + injection du bearer token ---
        services.AddHttpClient<ICbpTransactionSource, CbpTransactionSource>((sp, client) =>
        {
            var options = sp.GetRequiredService<IOptions<CbpApiOptions>>().Value;
            if (options.BaseUrl is not null)
            {
                client.BaseAddress = options.BaseUrl;
            }

            // Les timeouts sont pilotés par le pipeline de résilience (cf. ci-dessous).
            client.Timeout = Timeout.InfiniteTimeSpan;
        })
        .AddHttpMessageHandler<CbpBearerTokenHandler>() // auth (en amont des retries)
        .AddStandardResilienceHandler(resilience =>     // retry + timeout + circuit-breaker
            resilience.TotalRequestTimeout.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(
                configuration.GetSection(CbpApiOptions.SectionName).GetValue("TimeoutSeconds", 100)));

        // --- Accès données (Dapper) : fabriques de connexion ---
        services.AddSingleton<IIntegriteDbConnectionFactory, IntegriteDbConnectionFactory>();
        services.AddSingleton<IFxSentryDbConnectionFactory, FxSentryDbConnectionFactory>();

        // --- Source FXSentry (lecture vue) + persistance des résultats (schéma cbp ; tables créées par les DBA) ---
        services.AddScoped<IFxSentryTransactionSource, FxSentryTransactionSource>();
        services.AddScoped<IVerificationStore, VerificationStore>();

        // --- Notification ---
        services.AddSingleton<IBackOfficeNotifier, BackOfficeNotifier>();

        // --- Use-case ---
        services.AddScoped<RunVerificationHandler>();

        return services;
    }
}


//End VerificationModule


//VerificationContracts

using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Contrats (ports) de la slice Verification.
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/// <summary>Plage de dates de trade traitée par un run (fromTradeDate / toTradeDate).</summary>
/// <param name="FromTradeDate">Date de trade de début (incluse).</param>
/// <param name="ToTradeDate">Date de trade de fin (incluse).</param>
public sealed record VerificationDateRange(DateOnly FromTradeDate, DateOnly ToTradeDate);

/// <summary>Source des transactions CBP (ResultSet A) — API REST CBP.</summary>
public interface ICbpTransactionSource
{
    /// <exception cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException">Source indisponible ou réponse en erreur (« API down »).</exception>
    Task<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Source des transactions FXSentry (ResultSet B) — vue SQL Server cube.F_FRONTOFFICE.</summary>
public interface IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    /// <exception cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException">Source indisponible (base/vue inaccessible).</exception>
    Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Persistance des résultats (run + anomalies).</summary>
public interface IVerificationStore
{
    Task SaveRunAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken);

    Task AddAnomaliesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Notification du Back-Office si au moins une anomalie.</summary>
public interface IBackOfficeNotifier
{
    Task NotifyAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>
/// Levée par une source lorsqu'elle est indisponible (cas « ex. API down »).
/// Interceptée par le handler pour clôturer le run en échec proprement.
/// </summary>
public sealed class TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource source, string message, Exception? innerException = null)
    : Exception(message, innerException)
{
    public TransactionSource FailedSource { get; } = source;
}


//End VerificationContracts

//SecretServerTokenProvider
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options d'accès au coffre Secret Server (section « SecretServer »).</summary>
public sealed class SecretServerOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "SecretServer";

    /// <summary>URL de base du Secret Server.</summary>
    [Required]
    public Uri? BaseUrl { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Nom du secret contenant le bearer token CBP (recherché par nom).</summary>
    [Required]
    public string? SecretName { get; set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Slug du champ du secret portant le token. Secret basé sur le template
    /// « Generic API Key » → champ « API Key », slug <c>api-key</c> (à confirmer côté coffre).
    /// </summary>
    public string TokenFieldSlug { get; set; } = "api-key";
}

/// <summary>
/// Fournit le bearer token d'appel à l'API CBP. L'origine (Secret Server) reste
/// un détail d'infrastructure, masqué à l'adapter CBP.
/// </summary>
public interface ICbpTokenProvider
{
    Task<string> GetTokenAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>
/// Récupère le bearer token CBP depuis le Secret Server (API REST Delinea) et le
/// conserve (cache) pour la durée du run, en **Authentification Windows Intégrée** :
/// l'identité du compte qui exécute le batch (compte de service Control-M) authentifie
/// les requêtes — aucun username/password. Endpoints sous <c>/winauthwebservices/api/v1</c>
/// (l'envoi des credentials Windows est configuré sur le HttpClient « SecretServer »,
/// cf. <c>VerificationModule</c> : <c>UseDefaultCredentials = true</c>).
///   1. recherche du secret par NOM → résolution de son id ;
///   2. lecture du champ <c>TokenFieldSlug</c>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class SecretServerCbpTokenProvider : ICbpTokenProvider
{
    public const string HttpClientName = "SecretServer";

    // Mirroir de l'API sous authentification Windows intégrée.
    private const string ApiBase = "/winauthwebservices/api/v1";

    private readonly IHttpClientFactory _httpClientFactory;
    private readonly SecretServerOptions _options;
    private readonly ILogger<SecretServerCbpTokenProvider> _logger;

    // Lazy<Task<...>> : le token n'est récupéré qu'une fois, de façon thread-safe.
    private readonly Lazy<Task<string>> _token;

    public SecretServerCbpTokenProvider(
        IHttpClientFactory httpClientFactory,
        IOptions<SecretServerOptions> options,
        ILogger<SecretServerCbpTokenProvider> logger)
    {
        _httpClientFactory = httpClientFactory;
        _options = options.Value;
        _logger = logger;
        _token = new Lazy<Task<string>>(FetchTokenAsync);
    }

    public Task<string> GetTokenAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) => _token.Value;

    private async Task<string> FetchTokenAsync()
    {
        _logger.LogInformation(
            "Récupération du bearer token CBP (secret « {SecretName} », champ {Field}) depuis Secret Server (auth Windows intégrée).",
            _options.SecretName, _options.TokenFieldSlug);

        try
        {
            var client = _httpClientFactory.CreateClient(HttpClientName);
            var secretId = await ResolveSecretIdAsync(client);
            return await ReadSecretFieldAsync(client, secretId);
        }
        catch (HttpRequestException ex)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException("Échec d'accès au Secret Server.", ex);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Résout l'id numérique du secret à partir de son nom (recherche).</summary>
    private async Task<int> ResolveSecretIdAsync(HttpClient client)
    {
        var name = _options.SecretName ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("SecretServer:SecretName non configuré.");

        using var response = await client.GetAsync($"{ApiBase}/secrets?filter.searchField=name&filter.searchText={Uri.EscapeDataString(name)}");
        response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();

        var result = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<SecretSearchResponse>();
        var match = result?.Records?.FirstOrDefault(r => string.Equals(r.Name, name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        return match?.Id
            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"Secret « {name} » introuvable dans Secret Server.");
    }

    private async Task<string> ReadSecretFieldAsync(HttpClient client, int secretId)
    {
        using var response = await client.GetAsync($"{ApiBase}/secrets/{secretId}/fields/{_options.TokenFieldSlug}");
        response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();

        // L'endpoint renvoie la valeur du champ, généralement encodée en chaîne JSON.
        var raw = (await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync()).Trim();
        if (raw.Length >= 2 && raw[0] == '"' && raw[^1] == '"')
        {
            return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<string>(raw) ?? raw;
        }

        return raw;
    }

    private sealed class SecretSearchResponse
    {
        [JsonPropertyName("records")]
        public List<SecretSummary>? Records { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class SecretSummary
    {
        [JsonPropertyName("id")]
        public int Id { get; set; }

        [JsonPropertyName("name")]
        public string? Name { get; set; }
    }
}

//End SecretServerTokenProvider


//RunVerification
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Text.Json;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Mode d'exécution déterminant la plage de dates de trade à traiter.</summary>
public enum VerificationMode
{
    /// <summary>Veille : fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    Veille,

    /// <summary>Journée courante : fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    JourneeCourante,
}

/// <summary>Commande : lancer la vérification d'intégrité pour un mode donné.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode Mode);

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run, utilisé par le host pour le code de sortie.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationResult
{
    public required Guid RunId { get; init; }
    public required VerificationStatus Status { get; init; }
    public int CbpTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int FxTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int AnomalyCount { get; init; }
    public string? FailureReason { get; init; }

    public bool Succeeded => Status == VerificationStatus.Completed;
    public bool HasAnomalies => AnomalyCount > 0;

    public static RunVerificationResult FromRun(VerificationRun run) => new()
    {
        RunId = run.Id,
        Status = run.Status,
        CbpTransactionCount = run.CbpTransactionCount,
        FxTransactionCount = run.FxTransactionCount,
        AnomalyCount = run.AnomalyCount,
        FailureReason = run.FailureReason,
    };
}

/// <summary>
/// Use-case central : extrait CBP + FXSentry pour la plage du mode, délègue le
/// rapprochement au <see cref="VerificationEngine"/>, persiste, et notifie en cas d'anomalies.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationHandler(
    ICbpTransactionSource cbpSource,
    IFxSentryTransactionSource fxSource,
    VerificationEngine engine,
    IVerificationStore store,
    IBackOfficeNotifier notifier,
    IClock clock,
    ILogger<RunVerificationHandler> logger)
{
    public async Task<RunVerificationResult> HandleAsync(RunVerificationCommand command, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(command);

        var today = DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.Date);
        var range = ResolveRange(command.Mode, today);

        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), range.ToTradeDate, clock.Current);
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        using var scope = logger.BeginScope("Run {RunId} - {Mode} [{From}..{To}]", run.Id, command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate);
        logger.LogInformation(
            "Démarrage de la vérification — mode {Mode}, tradeDate {From}..{To} (run {RunId}).",
            command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate, run.Id);

        IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbpTransactions;
        IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fxTransactions;
        try
        {
            cbpTransactions = await cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("CBP : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", cbpTransactions.Count);

            fxTransactions = await fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("FXSentry : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", fxTransactions.Count);
        }
        catch (TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex)
        {
            run.Fail(clock.Current, $"Source {ex.FailedSource} indisponible : {ex.Message}");
            await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogError(ex, "Source {Source} indisponible — run {RunId} en échec après {Elapsed}.", ex.FailedSource, run.Id, stopwatch.Elapsed);
            return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
        }

        var anomalies = engine.Verify(cbpTransactions, fxTransactions, clock.Current);

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Rapprochement : {Total} anomalie(s) — Tx CBP absentes FX={CbpMissing}, Tx FX absentes CBP={FxMissing}, écarts champs={FieldDiffs}.",
            anomalies.Count,
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.CbpNotInFxSentry),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FxSentryNotInCbp),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences));

        LogTopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        await store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, cancellationToken);
        run.Complete(clock.Current, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count, anomalies.Count);
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);

        if (anomalies.Count > 0)
        {
            await notifier.NotifyAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("Back-Office notifié ({Count} anomalie(s)).", anomalies.Count);
        }

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Vérification terminée — statut {Status}, {AnomalyCount} anomalie(s), durée {Elapsed}.",
            run.Status, anomalies.Count, stopwatch.Elapsed);

        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    /// <summary>Journalise les 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart (anomalies de code 3).</summary>
    private void LogTopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        var topFields = anomalies
            .Where(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences && a.ChampsErreurs is not null)
            .SelectMany(a => JsonSerializer.Deserialize<string[]>(a.ChampsErreurs!) ?? [])
            .GroupBy(field => field, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .OrderByDescending(group => group.Count())
            .ThenBy(group => group.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Take(5)
            .Select(group => $"{group.Key}={group.Count()}")
            .ToArray();

        if (topFields.Length > 0)
        {
            logger.LogInformation("Top champs en écart : {TopFields}.", string.Join(", ", topFields));
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Résout la plage de dates de trade selon le mode.</summary>
    public static VerificationDateRange ResolveRange(VerificationMode mode, DateOnly today) => mode switch
    {
        VerificationMode.Veille => new VerificationDateRange(today.AddDays(-1), today),
        VerificationMode.JourneeCourante => new VerificationDateRange(today, today),
        _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(mode)),
    };
}

//End RunVerification


//FxSentryTransactionSource
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Data.SqlClient;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options de la source FXSentry (section « FxSentry » de appsettings). La chaîne
/// de connexion vit dans ConnectionStrings:FxSentry.</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "FxSentry";

    /// <summary>Schéma de la vue exposant les transactions FXSentry.</summary>
    public string ViewSchema { get; set; } = "cube";

    /// <summary>
    /// Vue (maintenue par les DBA) appliquant jointures/filtres et résolvant C_CROSS — cf. db/README.md.
    /// </summary>
    public string ViewName { get; set; } = "F_FRONTOFFICE";
}

/// <summary>Ligne brute de la vue FXSentry (matérialisée par Dapper). Dates en INT yyyyMMdd.</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryRow
{
    public string CustRef { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string TradeNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int ActiveTradeStatus { get; set; }
    public string CrossBaseCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string CrossCurrencyCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public bool CrossFlipped { get; set; }
    public string BuyCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SellCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SetCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? UserId { get; set; }
    public string CustomerCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int OriginalMaster { get; set; }
    public string? Remark { get; set; }
    public decimal FxRate { get; set; }
    public decimal FxSpread { get; set; }
    public int ValueDate { get; set; }
    public int TradeDate { get; set; }
    public decimal BuyAmount { get; set; }
    public decimal SellAmount { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter FXSentry (ResultSet B) : lit la vue (Dapper) filtrée sur la plage de TRADE_DATE.
/// Toute indisponibilité SQL est traduite en <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSource(
    IFxSentryDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory,
    IOptions<FxSentryOptions> options,
    ILogger<FxSentryTransactionSource> logger) : IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    private readonly FxSentryOptions _options = options.Value;

    public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(range);

        var fromTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.FromTradeDate);
        var toTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.ToTradeDate);

        var sql = $"""
            SELECT CUST_REF AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CustRef)},
                   TRADE_NUMBER AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.TradeNumber)},
                   ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.ActiveTradeStatus)},
                   CROSS_BASE_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossBaseCode)},
                   CROSS_CURRENCY_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossCurrencyCode)},
                   CROSS_FLIPPED AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossFlipped)},
                   BUY_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.BuyCurrency)},
                   SELL_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SellCurrency)},
                   SET_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SetCurrency)},
                   USER_ID AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.UserId)},
                   CUSTOMER_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CustomerCode)},
                   ORIGINAL_MASTER AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.OriginalMaster)},
                   REMARK AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.Remark)},
                   FX_RATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.FxRate)},
                   FX_SPREAD AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.FxSpread)},
                   VALUE_DATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.ValueDate)},
                   TRADE_DATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.TradeDate)},
                   BUY_AMOUNT AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.BuyAmount)},
                   SELL_AMOUNT AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SellAmount)}
            FROM {_options.ViewSchema}.{_options.ViewName}
            WHERE TRADE_DATE BETWEEN @FromTradeDate AND @ToTradeDate;
            """;

        try
        {
            logger.LogDebug("Lecture de la vue FXSentry [{From}..{To}].", fromTradeDate, toTradeDate);

            using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
            var rows = await connection.QueryAsync<FxSentryRow>(
                new CommandDefinition(sql, new { FromTradeDate = fromTradeDate, ToTradeDate = toTradeDate }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

            return rows.Select(Map).ToArray();
        }
        catch (SqlException ex)
        {
            throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.FxSentry, "Base FXSentry inaccessible.", ex);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Projette une ligne de vue vers le modèle de domaine (conversion des dates INT).</summary>
    public static FxSentryTransaction Map(FxSentryRow row)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(row);
        return new FxSentryTransaction
        {
            CustRef = row.CustRef,
            TradeNumber = row.TradeNumber,
            ActiveTradeStatus = row.ActiveTradeStatus,
            CrossBaseCode = row.CrossBaseCode,
            CrossCurrencyCode = row.CrossCurrencyCode,
            CrossFlipped = row.CrossFlipped,
            BuyCurrency = row.BuyCurrency,
            SellCurrency = row.SellCurrency,
            SetCurrency = row.SetCurrency,
            UserId = row.UserId,
            CustomerCode = row.CustomerCode,
            OriginalMaster = row.OriginalMaster,
            Remark = row.Remark,
            FxRate = row.FxRate,
            FxSpread = row.FxSpread,
            ValueDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.ValueDate),
            TradeDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.TradeDate),
            BuyAmount = row.BuyAmount,
            SellAmount = row.SellAmount,
        };
    }

    private static int ToYyyymmdd(DateOnly date) => (date.Year * 10000) + (date.Month * 100) + date.Day;

    public static DateOnly FromYyyymmdd(int value) => new(value / 10000, value / 100 % 100, value % 100);
}

//End FxSentryTransactionSource
